text:
In the mystical forest of Eldoria, where ancient trees whispered secrets to dreaming moths, lived a wise old owl named Opal.

Every dawn, Opal would glide down to the riverbank, her golden feathers glistening in the first light. There, she'd gather fresh waterdrops to sip on before her long, vigilant watches.

One particular morning, a tiny dewdrop slipped from her beak into a flower. The flower twinkled with life as it murmured secrets to the droplet. Before nightfall, the droplet blossomed into a small butterfly, fluttering off into the rustling woods.

The butterfly landed on a cluster of lavender buds, sucking their scent into its delicate pores. It felt extraordinary energy coursing through it. Unbeknownst to the butterfly, its energy was drawn back into the woods when night swallowed the world.

Weeks passed, and from that lavender bud bloomed a garden of enchantment. Each bloom glowed softly, beckoning creatures to
